description_long: This is a vintage-style cash register with a metallic teal body and a wooden base. The front features a prominent keypad with ten round metallic buttons arranged in a grid, a lever handle on the right side, and a numeric display at the top showing '3420' with the word 'CASH' beside it. The cash drawer is partially open, revealing several gold coins inside, and more coins are scattered around the base. The left side has a slot that may serve as a receipt printer, while the right side highlights the lever mechanism. The back is smooth and unadorned except for the continuation of the numeric display. The overall design is robust, with shiny, reflective surfaces and a classic, mechanical appearance.
description: A vintage teal and wood cash register with a numeric display, metallic keypad, lever, and open cash drawer filled with coins.
description_view_0: Front view showing the keypad, numeric display, lever, and open cash drawer with visible coins.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the lever handle, the side profile of the keypad, and the open cash drawer with coins.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth metallic back and the numeric display at the top.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the curved metallic body, the side of the keypad, and the open cash drawer.
attribute_keypad_layout: 10-key numeric grid with round metallic buttons
